testcase.name: testRebalanceWithMultipleConsumers
testcase.system-out: 11:51:42.724 [main] INFO c.g.minikafka.server.KafkaServer - Starting KafkaServer on port 19093 11:51:42.733 [main] INFO c.g.m.server.network.SocketServer - SocketServer started 11:51:42.733 [kafka-acceptor] INFO c.g.m.server.network.Acceptor - testcase.name: testProduceAndConsume
testcase.system-out: 11:51:46.191 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.network.NetworkClient - Connected to localhost:19093 11:51:47.397 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.producer.KafkaProducer - KafkaProducer closed 11:51:47.397 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.network.NetworkClient - Connected to localhost:19093 11:51:47.398 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - Joining group test-group, memberId= 11:51:47.398 [kafka-request-handler-958324156047291] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Member client-3 joined group test-group, generation=1 11:51:47.398 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - Joined group test-group, memberId=client-3, generation=1, leader=client-3 11:51:47.399 [kafka-request-handler-958322032856291] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Group test-group stabilized at generation 1 11:51:47.399 [main] INFO c.g.m.c.consumer.ConsumerCoordinator - SyncGroup complete, assigned: [test-topic-0, test-topic-1] 11:51:47.400 [kafka-request-handler-958322941327916] INFO c.g.m.s.coordinator.GroupCoordinator - Member client-3 left group test-group 11:51:47.400 [main] INFO c.g.m.clients.consumer.KafkaConsumer - KafkaConsumer closed
